note: LG이노텍 PoC tenant 카탈로그 — 클린룸·노광·검사·도금 설비 PM/MRO. 백엔드 키는 heavy_industry이지만 사용자에게는 '설비관리'로 노출. 광학솔루션(카메라 모듈/3D 센싱), 패키지솔루션(반도체 패키지 기판/포토마스크/FC-BGA), 모빌리티솔루션(자율주행 센서/파워 모듈) 양산 라인 PM/MRO 대상. 핵심 위험: 잔류 화학물질(HF/KOH/황산/인산/도금액) 폭로, LOTO 잔류 에너지, 클린룸 협소공간, 특수가스(SiH4/NH3/Cl2) 누출, 고전압(RF generator/EFEM), 잔류 진공, 추락(고소 설비). regulation 인용은 felix 검수 필요.

CLEANROOM_EQUIPMENT_PM.label_vi: Bảo trì phòng ngừa (PM) thiết bị phòng sạch
CLEANROOM_EQUIPMENT_PM.label_th: งานบำรุงรักษาเชิงป้องกัน (PM) อุปกรณ์ห้องคลีนรูม

baseline.content: 장비 전원·RF·구동부 LOTO 시행 및 잔류전압·잔류압력 확인
baseline.content_en: Apply LOTO to power, RF, and drive systems; verify zero residual voltage and pressure
baseline.content_vi: Áp dụng LOTO cho nguồn điện, RF và hệ truyền động; kiểm tra điện áp và áp suất dư bằng 0
baseline.content_th: ดำเนินการ LOTO กับแหล่งจ่ายไฟ, RF และระบบขับเคลื่อน; ตรวจสอบแรงดันไฟฟ้าและความดันคงค้างเป็นศูนย์
baseline.content_id: Terapkan LOTO pada sumber daya listrik, RF, dan sistem penggerak; verifikasi tegangan dan tekanan sisa nol

scenarios.content: RF generator 전원 차단 누락 상태에서 챔버 커버 분해 → 감전·아크플래시
scenarios.content_en: Disassembling chamber cover while RF generator power is not isolated → electric shock / arc flash
scenarios.content_vi: Tháo nắp buồng khi chưa cách ly nguồn RF generator → điện giật / arc flash
scenarios.content_th: ถอดฝาห้องขณะที่ยังไม่ตัดแหล่งจ่าย RF generator → ไฟฟ้าช็อต / arc flash
scenarios.content_id: Membongkar penutup chamber saat sumber RF generator belum diisolasi → tersengat listrik / arc flash

scenarios.content: 압축공기·진공 잔압 상태에서 라인 분해 → 부품 비산
scenarios.content_en: Disassembling lines under residual compressed-air / vacuum pressure → parts ejection
scenarios.content_vi: Tháo đường ống khi còn áp dư khí nén / chân không → văng linh kiện
scenarios.content_th: ถอดท่อขณะที่ยังมีแรงดันคงค้างของอากาศอัด / สุญญากาศ → ชิ้นส่วนกระเด็น
scenarios.content_id: Membongkar saluran saat masih ada tekanan sisa udara tekan / vakum → komponen terlempar

mitigations.content: 전원·RF·공압·진공 4분야 개별 LOTO + 검전기로 0V / 0 kPa 확인 + Tag 부착
mitigations.content_en: Apply individual LOTO to all four (power/RF/pneumatic/vacuum); verify 0 V and 0 kPa with testers; attach tag
mitigations.content_vi: Áp dụng LOTO riêng cho cả bốn (điện/RF/khí nén/chân không); xác nhận 0 V và 0 kPa bằng máy đo; gắn thẻ
mitigations.content_th: ดำเนินการ LOTO แยกสำหรับทั้งสี่ระบบ (ไฟฟ้า/RF/นิวเมติก/สุญญากาศ); ยืนยัน 0 V และ 0 kPa ด้วยเครื่องวัด; ติดป้าย
mitigations.content_id: Terapkan LOTO terpisah untuk keempat sistem (listrik/RF/pneumatik/vakum); verifikasi 0 V dan 0 kPa dengan tester; pasang tag

ppe.content_en: Insulating gloves (Class 0+) and arc-flash face shield
ppe.content_vi: Găng tay cách điện (Class 0+) và tấm che mặt chống arc flash
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือฉนวน (Class 0+) และเฟซชิลด์กันอาร์กแฟลช
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan isolasi (Class 0+) dan face shield anti arc-flash

baseline.content: 클린룸 등급(Class 100/1000) 유지 — 가먼팅·작업영역 격리 확인
baseline.content_en: Maintain cleanroom class (Class 100/1000) — verify garmenting and work-area isolation
baseline.content_vi: Duy trì cấp độ phòng sạch (Class 100/1000) — kiểm tra trang phục và cách ly khu vực làm việc
baseline.content_th: รักษาระดับคลีนรูม (Class 100/1000) — ตรวจสอบการสวมชุดและการกั้นพื้นที่ทำงาน
baseline.content_id: Pertahankan kelas cleanroom (Class 100/1000) — verifikasi gowning dan isolasi area kerja

scenarios.content: PM 중 격리 커튼 미설치 → 인접 라인 입자 오염 + 양품 불량 + 라인 정지
scenarios.content_en: No isolation curtain during PM → particle contamination of adjacent lines, yield loss, line stop
scenarios.content_vi: Không có rèm cách ly trong khi PM → nhiễm hạt sang dây chuyền liền kề, mất sản lượng, dừng dây
scenarios.content_th: ไม่มีม่านกั้นระหว่างทำ PM → อนุภาคปนเปื้อนสายการผลิตข้างเคียง สูญเสีย yield และสายหยุด
scenarios.content_id: Tidak ada tirai isolasi saat PM → kontaminasi partikel jalur sebelahnya, kehilangan yield, jalur berhenti

mitigations.content: 임시 soft-wall + 차압 모니터링(>5 Pa) 유지, 작업 후 파티클 카운터로 회복 확인
mitigations.content_en: Erect temporary soft-wall and maintain pressure differential (>5 Pa); verify recovery with particle counter after work
mitigations.content_vi: Dựng vách mềm tạm thời và duy trì chênh áp (>5 Pa); xác nhận hồi phục bằng máy đếm hạt sau khi xong
mitigations.content_th: ติดตั้งผนังอ่อนชั่วคราวและรักษาความต่างความดัน (>5 Pa); ยืนยันการคืนสภาพด้วยเครื่องนับอนุภาคหลังงาน
mitigations.content_id: Pasang dinding lunak sementara dan jaga beda tekanan (>5 Pa); verifikasi pemulihan dengan particle counter setelah pekerjaan

ppe.content: 방진복(Class 100 등급), 후드, 부츠, 마스크, 장갑 (전신 가먼팅)
ppe.content_en: Cleanroom suit (Class 100), hood, boots, mask, gloves (full bunny suit)
ppe.content_vi: Bộ đồ phòng sạch (Class 100), mũ trùm, ủng, khẩu trang, găng tay (bunny suit toàn thân)
ppe.content_th: ชุดคลีนรูม (Class 100), ฮู้ด, รองเท้าบูท, หน้ากาก, ถุงมือ (bunny suit เต็มตัว)
ppe.content_id: Pakaian cleanroom (Class 100), hood, boots, masker, sarung tangan (bunny suit lengkap)

baseline.content: 장비 인터록·E-stop·도어 센서 기능 시험 후 가동 복귀
baseline.content_en: Test interlocks, E-stop, and door sensors before returning equipment to service
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra liên động, E-stop và cảm biến cửa trước khi cho thiết bị vận hành lại
baseline.content_th: ทดสอบอินเตอร์ล็อก, E-stop และเซ็นเซอร์ประตูก่อนนำเครื่องกลับใช้งาน
baseline.content_id: Uji interlock, E-stop, dan sensor pintu sebelum mengembalikan peralatan ke operasi
baseline.regulation: 산업안전보건기준규칙 제87조(원동기·회전축 등의 위험방지), SEMI S2 §10

scenarios.content: PM 중 인터록 강제 우회한 채 복귀 → 도어 개방 상태 가동 → 협착
scenarios.content_en: Returning equipment with interlock bypassed during PM → operation with door open → pinch injury
scenarios.content_vi: Khôi phục thiết bị khi đang bypass liên động trong PM → vận hành với cửa mở → kẹp tay
scenarios.content_th: นำเครื่องกลับมาใช้ขณะที่บายพาสอินเตอร์ล็อกระหว่าง PM → ทำงานขณะประตูเปิด → ถูกหนีบ
scenarios.content_id: Mengembalikan peralatan dengan interlock di-bypass saat PM → beroperasi dengan pintu terbuka → terjepit

mitigations.content: PM 종료 시 bypass key 회수 + 인터록·E-stop·도어 센서 3종 동작시험 기록
mitigations.content_en: Retrieve bypass keys after PM and log functional tests of interlocks, E-stop, and door sensors
mitigations.content_vi: Thu hồi chìa khóa bypass sau PM và ghi nhật ký kiểm tra liên động, E-stop và cảm biến cửa
mitigations.content_th: เก็บกุญแจบายพาสคืนหลัง PM และบันทึกการทดสอบอินเตอร์ล็อก, E-stop และเซ็นเซอร์ประตู
mitigations.content_id: Tarik kembali kunci bypass setelah PM dan catat pengujian fungsional interlock, E-stop, dan sensor pintu

ppe.content_en: Safety shoes, safety glasses, cleanroom gloves
ppe.content_vi: Giày bảo hộ, kính bảo hộ, găng tay phòng sạch
ppe.content_th: รองเท้าเซฟตี้, แว่นนิรภัย, ถุงมือคลีนรูม
ppe.content_id: Sepatu safety, kacamata safety, sarung tangan cleanroom

baseline.content: 장비 내부 잔류 화학물질·고온부품 확인 (≤45°C, 잔액 wipe)
baseline.content_en: Verify no residual chemicals and hot parts inside equipment (≤45°C, wipe residue)
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra không còn hóa chất tồn dư và bộ phận nóng bên trong (≤45°C, lau sạch)
baseline.content_th: ตรวจสอบไม่มีสารเคมีตกค้างและชิ้นส่วนร้อนภายในเครื่อง (≤45°C, เช็ดสาร)
baseline.content_id: Verifikasi tidak ada sisa bahan kimia dan komponen panas di dalam peralatan (≤45°C, lap residu)

scenarios.content: 히터 잔류열(>80°C) 상태로 wiping → 화상
scenarios.content_en: Wiping while heater retains residual heat (>80°C) → burn injury
scenarios.content_vi: Lau khi bộ gia nhiệt còn nhiệt dư (>80°C) → bỏng
scenarios.content_th: เช็ดทำความสะอาดขณะฮีตเตอร์ยังมีความร้อนคงค้าง (>80°C) → ถูกไหม้
scenarios.content_id: Mengelap saat heater masih panas sisa (>80°C) → luka bakar

mitigations.content: 비접촉 IR 온도계로 ≤45°C 확인 후 작업, IPA wipe + 중성화 cloth 준비
mitigations.content_en: Verify ≤45°C with non-contact IR thermometer before work; prepare IPA wipes and neutralizing cloth
mitigations.content_vi: Xác nhận ≤45°C bằng nhiệt kế IR không tiếp xúc trước khi làm; chuẩn bị khăn IPA và khăn trung hòa
mitigations.content_th: ยืนยัน ≤45°C ด้วยเทอร์โมมิเตอร์ IR แบบไม่สัมผัสก่อนทำงาน; เตรียมผ้าเช็ด IPA และผ้าทำให้เป็นกลาง
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi ≤45°C dengan termometer IR non-kontak sebelum bekerja; siapkan wipe IPA dan kain penetral

ppe.content: 내열 장갑(접촉부) + 내화학 장갑(니트릴 2겹) 이중 착용
ppe.content_en: Heat-resistant gloves (contact) over double-layer nitrile chemical gloves
ppe.content_vi: Găng tay chống nhiệt (phần tiếp xúc) bên ngoài găng tay nitrile hai lớp chống hóa chất
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือทนความร้อน (จุดสัมผัส) สวมทับถุงมือไนไตรล์ 2 ชั้นกันสารเคมี
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan tahan panas (titik kontak) di atas sarung tangan nitril dua lapis tahan kimia

PHOTO_LITHO_MAINTENANCE.label_vi: Bảo trì thiết bị Photo / quang khắc
PHOTO_LITHO_MAINTENANCE.label_th: งานบำรุงรักษาเครื่องโฟโต / ลิโทกราฟี

baseline.content: 광원(레이저/UV/excimer) 셔터 LOTO + 광경로 차단 확인
baseline.content_en: Apply LOTO to light source (laser/UV/excimer) shutter and verify beam path is blocked
baseline.content_vi: Áp dụng LOTO cho cửa chớp nguồn sáng (laser/UV/excimer) và xác nhận đường tia bị chặn
baseline.content_th: ดำเนินการ LOTO กับชัตเตอร์แหล่งกำเนิดแสง (laser/UV/excimer) และยืนยันว่าเส้นทางลำแสงถูกบล็อก
baseline.content_id: Terapkan LOTO pada shutter sumber cahaya (laser/UV/excimer) dan verifikasi jalur sinar terblokir

scenarios.content: 셔터 미차단 상태로 광경로 점검 → 망막 손상 / UV 화상
scenarios.content_en: Inspecting beam path with shutter open → retinal injury / UV burn
scenarios.content_vi: Kiểm tra đường tia khi cửa chớp chưa đóng → tổn thương võng mạc / bỏng UV
scenarios.content_th: ตรวจสอบเส้นทางลำแสงขณะชัตเตอร์ยังเปิด → ดวงตาบาดเจ็บ / ถูก UV ลวก
scenarios.content_id: Memeriksa jalur sinar saat shutter masih terbuka → cedera retina / luka bakar UV

mitigations.content: 셔터 LOTO + 흡수형 beam stop 설치 + 작업 전 power meter로 0 mW 확인
mitigations.content_en: Apply shutter LOTO, install absorbing beam stop, verify 0 mW with power meter before work
mitigations.content_vi: Áp dụng LOTO cho cửa chớp, lắp beam stop hấp thụ, xác nhận 0 mW bằng power meter trước khi làm
mitigations.content_th: LOTO ชัตเตอร์, ติดตั้ง beam stop แบบดูดซับ, ยืนยัน 0 mW ด้วย power meter ก่อนทำงาน
mitigations.content_id: Terapkan LOTO shutter, pasang beam stop penyerap, verifikasi 0 mW dengan power meter sebelum bekerja

ppe.content: 광원 파장 등급에 맞는 레이저/UV 보호안경(OD≥6)
ppe.content_en: Laser/UV protective eyewear rated for the source wavelength (OD ≥6)
ppe.content_vi: Kính bảo hộ laser/UV theo bước sóng nguồn (OD ≥6)
ppe.content_th: แว่นกันเลเซอร์/UV ตามความยาวคลื่นของแหล่งกำเนิด (OD ≥6)
ppe.content_id: Kacamata pelindung laser/UV sesuai panjang gelombang sumber (OD ≥6)

baseline.content_en: Purge and drain residual photoresist, developer (TMAH 2.38%), and solvent (PGMEA) lines
baseline.content_vi: Xả và làm sạch đường photoresist tồn dư, developer (TMAH 2.38%) và dung môi (PGMEA)
baseline.content_th: Purge และระบายสายโฟโตเรซิสต์, น้ำยาดีเวลอป (TMAH 2.38%) และตัวทำละลาย (PGMEA) ที่ค้าง
baseline.content_id: Purging dan drain jalur photoresist sisa, developer (TMAH 2.38%), dan solvent (PGMEA)

scenarios.content: TMAH 라인 미드레인 상태에서 라인 분리 → 피부 부식·전신중독(TMAH 치사적)
scenarios.content_en: Disconnecting TMAH line without draining → skin corrosion / systemic toxicity (TMAH is potentially lethal)
scenarios.content_vi: Tháo đường TMAH khi chưa xả → ăn mòn da / ngộ độc toàn thân (TMAH có thể gây tử vong)
scenarios.content_th: ถอดสาย TMAH โดยยังไม่ระบาย → ผิวหนังถูกกัด / พิษทั่วร่างกาย (TMAH อาจถึงตาย)
scenarios.content_id: Melepas saluran TMAH tanpa drain → korosi kulit / keracunan sistemik (TMAH berpotensi mematikan)

scenarios.content: PGMEA 잔류 + 정전기 스파크 → 화재
scenarios.content_en: Residual PGMEA + static spark → fire
scenarios.content_vi: PGMEA tồn dư + tia lửa tĩnh điện → cháy
scenarios.content_th: PGMEA ที่ค้าง + ประกายไฟฟ้าสถิต → ไฟไหม้
scenarios.content_id: Sisa PGMEA + percikan listrik statis → kebakaran

mitigations.content: 약액 라인 N2 퍼지 + DI water flush 3회 + pH 시험지로 중성(6~8) 확인
mitigations.content_en: N2 purge chemical lines, flush with DI water 3 times, verify pH 6–8 with strip
mitigations.content_vi: Purge N2 đường hóa chất, xả DI water 3 lần, xác nhận pH 6–8 bằng giấy thử
mitigations.content_th: Purge N2 สายเคมี, ฟลัชด้วยน้ำ DI 3 ครั้ง, ยืนยัน pH 6–8 ด้วยกระดาษทดสอบ
mitigations.content_id: Purging N2 jalur kimia, flush DI water 3 kali, verifikasi pH 6–8 dengan strip

mitigations.content: 용제 작업영역 접지 + 본딩 와이어 연결, 가연성 가스 측정기 LEL <10% 유지
mitigations.content_en: Ground and bond solvent area, maintain LEL < 10% with combustible gas detector
mitigations.content_vi: Tiếp địa và bonding khu vực dung môi, duy trì LEL < 10% bằng máy đo khí cháy
mitigations.content_th: ทำกราวด์และบอนด์พื้นที่ตัวทำละลาย, รักษา LEL < 10% ด้วยเครื่องวัดก๊าซติดไฟ
mitigations.content_id: Grounding dan bonding area solvent, jaga LEL < 10% dengan detektor gas mudah terbakar

ppe.content: 내화학 케미컬 슈트 + 부틸/네오프렌 장갑 2겹 + 풀페이스 방독마스크(유기증기/암모니아 카트리지)
ppe.content_en: Chemical-resistant suit + double-layer butyl/neoprene gloves + full-face respirator (organic vapor + ammonia cartridge)
ppe.content_vi: Bộ đồ kháng hóa chất + găng tay butyl/neoprene hai lớp + mặt nạ phòng độc toàn mặt (hộp lọc hơi hữu cơ + amoniac)
ppe.content_th: ชุดทนสารเคมี + ถุงมือ butyl/neoprene 2 ชั้น + หน้ากากเต็มหน้า (ตลับกรองไอระเหยอินทรีย์ + แอมโมเนีย)
ppe.content_id: Pakaian tahan kimia + sarung tangan butyl/neoprene 2 lapis + respirator full-face (kartrid uap organik + amonia)

baseline.content: 스테이지·웨이퍼/마스크 핸들러 LOTO 후 잔류 진공 해제
baseline.content_en: After LOTO, release residual vacuum on stage and wafer/mask handler
baseline.content_vi: Sau LOTO, xả chân không dư trên stage và bộ xử lý wafer/mask
baseline.content_th: หลัง LOTO ให้ปล่อยสุญญากาศคงค้างของ stage และตัวจับ wafer/mask
baseline.content_id: Setelah LOTO, lepaskan vakum sisa pada stage dan handler wafer/mask

scenarios.content: 잔류 진공 해제 없이 척 분해 → 마스크/웨이퍼 비산 또는 손가락 흡인 부상
scenarios.content_en: Disassembling chuck without releasing residual vacuum → mask/wafer ejection or finger suction injury
scenarios.content_vi: Tháo chuck khi chưa xả chân không dư → văng mask/wafer hoặc bị hút ngón tay
scenarios.content_th: ถอด chuck โดยไม่ปล่อยสุญญากาศคงค้าง → mask/wafer กระเด็น หรือนิ้วถูกดูด
scenarios.content_id: Membongkar chuck tanpa melepas vakum sisa → mask/wafer terlempar atau jari tersedot

mitigations.content: 진공 벤트 밸브 수동 개방 + 압력계 0 kPa 확인 + 마스크 손상 방지 받침대 사용
mitigations.content_en: Manually open vacuum vent, verify 0 kPa on gauge, use mask-support cradle to prevent damage
mitigations.content_vi: Mở van xả chân không bằng tay, xác nhận 0 kPa trên đồng hồ, dùng giá đỡ mask để tránh hư hỏng
mitigations.content_th: เปิดวาล์วระบายสุญญากาศด้วยมือ, ยืนยัน 0 kPa ที่เกจ, ใช้ที่รองรับ mask เพื่อป้องกันความเสียหาย
mitigations.content_id: Buka katup vent vakum manual, verifikasi 0 kPa pada gauge, gunakan dudukan penopang mask untuk mencegah kerusakan

ppe.content: 클린룸 장갑 + 보안경, 마스크 핸들링 면장갑 위 PE 글러브
ppe.content_en: Cleanroom gloves + safety glasses; PE gloves over cotton inner gloves for mask handling
ppe.content_vi: Găng phòng sạch + kính bảo hộ; găng PE bên ngoài găng cotton để xử lý mask
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือคลีนรูม + แว่นนิรภัย; ถุงมือ PE สวมทับถุงมือผ้าฝ้ายสำหรับจับ mask
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan cleanroom + kacamata safety; sarung tangan PE di atas sarung tangan katun untuk handling mask

baseline.content: 노광 챔버 협소공간 진입 시 산소·LEL·VOC 측정 후 작업허가서 발급
baseline.content_en: For confined-space entry into exposure chamber, measure O2, LEL, VOC and issue work permit
baseline.content_vi: Khi vào không gian hạn chế của buồng phơi sáng, đo O2, LEL, VOC và phát hành giấy phép làm việc
baseline.content_th: เมื่อเข้าที่อับอากาศของห้องเอกซ์โพส ให้วัด O2, LEL, VOC และออกใบอนุญาตทำงาน
baseline.content_id: Untuk masuk ruang terbatas chamber exposure, ukur O2, LEL, VOC dan terbitkan izin kerja

scenarios.content: N2 퍼지 후 산소 측정 누락 → 산소 결핍(<18%) 질식
scenarios.content_en: Skipping O2 measurement after N2 purge → oxygen deficiency (<18%) and suffocation
scenarios.content_vi: Bỏ qua đo O2 sau khi purge N2 → thiếu oxy (<18%) gây ngạt
scenarios.content_th: ข้ามการวัด O2 หลัง purge N2 → ออกซิเจนต่ำ (<18%) ขาดอากาศหายใจ
scenarios.content_id: Melewatkan pengukuran O2 setelah purge N2 → kekurangan oksigen (<18%) dan sesak napas

mitigations.content: 진입 전·중 휴대용 4-gas 측정(O2 19.5~23.5% / LEL <10% / VOC <50 ppm), 외부 감시자 1명 배치
mitigations.content_en: Use portable 4-gas meter before/during entry (O2 19.5–23.5% / LEL <10% / VOC <50 ppm); station an external attendant
mitigations.content_vi: Dùng máy đo 4 khí cầm tay trước/trong khi vào (O2 19.5–23.5% / LEL <10% / VOC <50 ppm); bố trí người giám sát bên ngoài
mitigations.content_th: ใช้เครื่องวัดก๊าซ 4 ตัวแบบพกพาก่อน/ระหว่างเข้า (O2 19.5–23.5% / LEL <10% / VOC <50 ppm); จัดผู้เฝ้าระวังภายนอก 1 คน
mitigations.content_id: Gunakan 4-gas meter portabel sebelum/selama masuk (O2 19.5–23.5% / LEL <10% / VOC <50 ppm); tempatkan attendant di luar

ppe.content_en: Portable 4-gas detector + emergency escape SCBA (10 min)
ppe.content_vi: Máy đo 4 khí cầm tay + SCBA thoát hiểm khẩn cấp (10 phút)
ppe.content_th: เครื่องวัดก๊าซ 4 ตัวพกพา + SCBA หนีฉุกเฉิน (10 นาที)
ppe.content_id: Detektor 4-gas portabel + SCBA escape darurat (10 menit)

PLATING_LINE_PM.label_vi: PM dây chuyền mạ / hóa chất photo
PLATING_LINE_PM.label_th: PM สายชุบโลหะ / สายเคมี photo

baseline.content: 약액조 펌프 정지·라인 격리(밸브 LOTO)·잔액 드레인 확인
baseline.content_en: Stop chemical bath pumps, isolate lines (valve LOTO), and verify residual drain
baseline.content_vi: Dừng bơm bể hóa chất, cô lập đường (LOTO van) và xác nhận đã xả tồn dư
baseline.content_th: หยุดปั๊มถังเคมี, แยกสาย (LOTO วาล์ว) และยืนยันการระบายของเหลวคงค้าง
baseline.content_id: Hentikan pompa bak kimia, isolasi jalur (LOTO valve), dan verifikasi drain residu

scenarios.content: 황산/HF 라인 잔액 미배출 상태 플랜지 분해 → 약액 분사·전신 화학화상
scenarios.content_en: Disassembling flange with residual H2SO4/HF in line → chemical splash and full-body chemical burn
scenarios.content_vi: Tháo bích khi đường còn H2SO4/HF tồn dư → bắn hóa chất và bỏng hóa chất toàn thân
scenarios.content_th: ถอดหน้าแปลนขณะที่สายยังมี H2SO4/HF ค้าง → สารเคมีกระเด็นและถูกสารเคมีไหม้ทั่วตัว
scenarios.content_id: Membongkar flange saat saluran masih ada sisa H2SO4/HF → cipratan kimia dan luka bakar kimia seluruh tubuh

scenarios.content: 도금액(시안화물 함유) 잔류 + 산성 약액 혼입 → 시안화수소(HCN) 발생
scenarios.content_en: Residual cyanide-bearing plating bath mixed with acid → hydrogen cyanide (HCN) release
scenarios.content_vi: Dung dịch mạ chứa cyanide tồn dư + axit trộn lẫn → giải phóng hydro cyanide (HCN)
scenarios.content_th: น้ำยาชุบที่มีไซยาไนด์ค้าง + กรดปนกัน → ปล่อยไฮโดรเจนไซยาไนด์ (HCN)
scenarios.content_id: Larutan plating mengandung sianida sisa + asam bercampur → pelepasan hidrogen sianida (HCN)

mitigations.content: 더블 블록·블리드 밸브 LOTO + 펌프 전원 LOTO + 드레인 후 DI 플러시 3회 + pH 4~9 확인
mitigations.content_en: Double block-and-bleed valve LOTO, pump LOTO, drain + DI flush 3 times, verify pH 4–9
mitigations.content_vi: LOTO van double block-and-bleed, LOTO bơm, xả + flush DI 3 lần, xác nhận pH 4–9
mitigations.content_th: LOTO วาล์ว double block-and-bleed, LOTO ปั๊ม, ระบาย + ฟลัช DI 3 ครั้ง, ยืนยัน pH 4–9
mitigations.content_id: LOTO valve double block-and-bleed, LOTO pompa, drain + flush DI 3 kali, verifikasi pH 4–9

mitigations.content: 시안 라인은 별도 격리 + HCN 검지기 휴대(임계 <4.7 ppm STEL)
mitigations.content_en: Isolate cyanide line separately and carry HCN detector (STEL threshold < 4.7 ppm)
mitigations.content_vi: Cô lập đường cyanide riêng và mang theo máy đo HCN (ngưỡng STEL < 4.7 ppm)
mitigations.content_th: แยกสายไซยาไนด์ออกต่างหากและพกเครื่องตรวจ HCN (เกณฑ์ STEL < 4.7 ppm)
mitigations.content_id: Isolasi jalur sianida terpisah dan bawa detektor HCN (ambang STEL < 4.7 ppm)

ppe.content: 전신 케미컬 슈트(PVC/PE) + 부틸 장갑 + 풀페이스 방독마스크(산성가스+시안 카트리지)
ppe.content_en: Full-body chemical suit (PVC/PE) + butyl gloves + full-face respirator (acid gas + cyanide cartridge)
ppe.content_vi: Bộ đồ hóa chất toàn thân (PVC/PE) + găng butyl + mặt nạ toàn mặt (hộp lọc khí axit + cyanide)
ppe.content_th: ชุดเคมีเต็มตัว (PVC/PE) + ถุงมือ butyl + หน้ากากเต็มหน้า (ตลับกรองก๊าซกรด + ไซยาไนด์)
ppe.content_id: Pakaian kimia full-body (PVC/PE) + sarung tangan butyl + respirator full-face (kartrid gas asam + sianida)

baseline.content: HF 작업 시 calcium gluconate 젤·세안설비·MSDS 비치 확인
baseline.content_en: For HF work, verify calcium gluconate gel, eyewash station, and MSDS are on hand
baseline.content_vi: Khi làm việc với HF, xác nhận có gel calcium gluconate, trạm rửa mắt và MSDS
baseline.content_th: ในงาน HF ให้ยืนยันว่ามีเจล calcium gluconate, จุดล้างตา และ MSDS
baseline.content_id: Untuk pekerjaan HF, verifikasi tersedia gel calcium gluconate, eyewash station, dan MSDS

scenarios.content: HF 피부 접촉 후 1차 대응 지연 → 칼슘 결핍 + 심정지(저농도라도 치명적)
scenarios.content_en: Delayed first response after HF skin contact → calcium depletion and cardiac arrest (lethal even at low concentration)
scenarios.content_vi: Phản ứng đầu chậm sau khi HF tiếp xúc da → thiếu calci và ngừng tim (gây tử vong dù nồng độ thấp)
scenarios.content_th: ตอบสนองช้าเมื่อ HF สัมผัสผิวหนัง → ขาดแคลเซียมและหัวใจหยุดเต้น (อันตรายถึงตายแม้ความเข้มข้นต่ำ)
scenarios.content_id: Respons awal lambat setelah HF kontak kulit → kekurangan kalsium dan henti jantung (mematikan meski konsentrasi rendah)

mitigations.content: HF 작업 반경 5m 내 calcium gluconate gel 2개 + 15초 이내 도달 eyewash + 응급실 연락처 사전 공유
mitigations.content_en: Within 5 m of HF work, station 2 calcium gluconate gel tubes + eyewash reachable within 15 s + pre-share ER contacts
mitigations.content_vi: Trong vòng 5 m khu vực HF, đặt 2 tuýp calcium gluconate gel + eyewash trong 15 s + chia sẻ trước liên hệ cấp cứu
mitigations.content_th: ภายในรัศมี 5 ม. ของงาน HF ให้วาง gel calcium gluconate 2 หลอด + eyewash เข้าถึงใน 15 วินาที + แจ้งเบอร์ฉุกเฉินล่วงหน้า
mitigations.content_id: Dalam radius 5 m area HF, sediakan 2 tube gel calcium gluconate + eyewash terjangkau dalam 15 detik + bagikan kontak IGD

ppe.content: HF 전용 부틸 장갑(0.5mm 이상) + 페이스쉴드 + 앞치마형 산화학복
ppe.content_en: HF-rated butyl gloves (≥0.5 mm) + face shield + acid-resistant apron
ppe.content_vi: Găng butyl chuyên dụng cho HF (≥0.5 mm) + tấm che mặt + tạp dề kháng axit
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือ butyl เกรด HF (≥0.5 มม.) + เฟซชิลด์ + ผ้ากันเปื้อนทนกรด
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan butyl khusus HF (≥0.5 mm) + face shield + apron tahan asam

baseline.content: 도금조 정류기 DC 전원 LOTO + 양극·음극 단락 방지 접지
baseline.content_en: Apply LOTO to plating rectifier DC power and ground anode/cathode to prevent short
baseline.content_vi: Áp dụng LOTO cho nguồn DC chỉnh lưu bể mạ và tiếp địa anode/cathode để chống ngắn mạch
baseline.content_th: ดำเนินการ LOTO กับแหล่งจ่าย DC ของ rectifier ถังชุบและกราวด์ anode/cathode เพื่อกันลัดวงจร
baseline.content_id: Terapkan LOTO pada catu daya DC rectifier bak plating dan grounding anoda/katoda untuk mencegah hubung singkat

scenarios.content: 정류기 미차단 상태 양극판 교체 → 고전류(>500A) 아크 + 약액 비산
scenarios.content_en: Replacing anode plate without rectifier isolation → high-current (>500A) arc and electrolyte splash
scenarios.content_vi: Thay tấm anode khi chưa cách ly rectifier → hồ quang dòng cao (>500A) và bắn dung dịch
scenarios.content_th: เปลี่ยนแผ่น anode โดยไม่ตัด rectifier → อาร์กกระแสสูง (>500A) และน้ำยากระเด็น
scenarios.content_id: Mengganti pelat anoda tanpa isolasi rectifier → busur arus tinggi (>500A) dan cipratan elektrolit

mitigations.content: DC 전원 LOTO + 클램프 멀티미터로 0A 확인 + 양극/음극 임시 접지 막대 부착
mitigations.content_en: DC LOTO, verify 0 A with clamp meter, attach temporary grounding rods to anode/cathode
mitigations.content_vi: LOTO DC, xác nhận 0 A bằng ampe kìm, gắn thanh tiếp địa tạm cho anode/cathode
mitigations.content_th: LOTO DC, ยืนยัน 0 A ด้วยแคลมป์มิเตอร์, ติดแท่งกราวด์ชั่วคราวที่ anode/cathode
mitigations.content_id: LOTO DC, verifikasi 0 A dengan clamp meter, pasang batang grounding sementara di anoda/katoda

ppe.content: 절연 장갑(DC 1000V급) + 케미컬 페이스쉴드 + 절연 안전화
ppe.content_en: Insulating gloves (DC 1000 V class) + chemical face shield + insulating safety shoes
ppe.content_vi: Găng cách điện (Class DC 1000 V) + tấm che mặt chống hóa chất + giày bảo hộ cách điện
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือฉนวน (Class DC 1000 V) + เฟซชิลด์กันสารเคมี + รองเท้าเซฟตี้ฉนวน
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan isolasi (kelas DC 1000 V) + face shield kimia + sepatu safety isolasi

baseline.content: 약액 누설 시 흡착포·중화제(중탄산나트륨/탄산칼슘) 즉시 사용 가능 상태 점검
baseline.content_en: Verify absorbent pads and neutralizer (sodium bicarbonate / calcium carbonate) are ready for spill
baseline.content_vi: Xác nhận khăn thấm và chất trung hòa (sodium bicarbonate / calcium carbonate) sẵn sàng cho sự cố tràn
baseline.content_th: ยืนยันว่าแผ่นซับและสารทำให้เป็นกลาง (โซเดียมไบคาร์บอเนต / แคลเซียมคาร์บอเนต) พร้อมใช้สำหรับการรั่วไหล
baseline.content_id: Verifikasi pad penyerap dan penetral (sodium bikarbonat / kalsium karbonat) siap untuk tumpahan

scenarios.content: 누설 발생 시 중화제 부재 → 약액 확산 + 인근 배수구 유입 → 토양·수질 오염
scenarios.content_en: Spill occurs without neutralizer on hand → chemical spreads, enters drain, contaminates soil/water
scenarios.content_vi: Xảy ra rò rỉ nhưng không có chất trung hòa → hóa chất lan, vào cống, ô nhiễm đất/nước
scenarios.content_th: เกิดการรั่วไหลแต่ไม่มีสารทำให้เป็นกลาง → สารเคมีกระจาย ไหลเข้าท่อระบาย ปนเปื้อนดิน/น้ำ
scenarios.content_id: Tumpahan terjadi tanpa penetral tersedia → kimia menyebar, masuk drainase, mencemari tanah/air

mitigations.content: Spill kit 위치·재고 점검 + 배수구 임시 차단판(drain seal) 비치 + 5분 내 가동 시연 가능
mitigations.content_en: Inspect spill kit location/stock, station drain-seal blocks, ensure 5-minute deployment drill capability
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra vị trí/tồn kho spill kit, bố trí chặn cống, đảm bảo có thể triển khai trong 5 phút
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจตำแหน่ง/สต็อก spill kit, วางแผ่นปิดท่อระบาย, รับรองว่าระดมพลใน 5 นาทีได้
mitigations.content_id: Periksa lokasi/stok spill kit, sediakan penutup drainase, pastikan kemampuan deployment 5 menit

ppe.content: 내화학 부츠(EVA) + 케미컬 슈트(앞치마형) + 방독마스크(산성가스 카트리지)
ppe.content_en: Chemical-resistant boots (EVA) + chemical apron suit + respirator (acid gas cartridge)
ppe.content_vi: Ủng kháng hóa chất (EVA) + tạp dề kháng hóa chất + mặt nạ phòng độc (hộp lọc khí axit)
ppe.content_th: รองเท้าบูทกันสารเคมี (EVA) + ชุดผ้ากันเปื้อนทนเคมี + หน้ากากกันแก๊ส (ตลับกรองก๊าซกรด)
ppe.content_id: Boots tahan kimia (EVA) + apron kimia + respirator (kartrid gas asam)

GAS_CABINET_INSPECTION.label_vi: Kiểm tra tủ khí đặc biệt
GAS_CABINET_INSPECTION.label_th: การตรวจสอบตู้ก๊าซพิเศษ

baseline.content: 캐비닛 환기·차압(>15 Pa)·가스누출 감지기 zero calibration 확인
baseline.content_en: Verify cabinet ventilation, pressure differential (>15 Pa), and zero-calibrate gas leak detectors
baseline.content_vi: Xác nhận thông gió tủ, chênh áp (>15 Pa) và hiệu chỉnh zero máy dò rò khí
baseline.content_th: ยืนยันการระบายอากาศตู้, ความต่างความดัน (>15 Pa) และ zero-calibrate เครื่องตรวจรั่วก๊าซ
baseline.content_id: Verifikasi ventilasi cabinet, beda tekanan (>15 Pa), dan zero-calibration detektor kebocoran gas

scenarios.content: 차압 미달(<5 Pa) + SiH4 누출 → 캐비닛 내 자연발화 + 폭발
scenarios.content_en: Insufficient differential (<5 Pa) + SiH4 leak → pyrophoric ignition inside cabinet + explosion
scenarios.content_vi: Chênh áp không đủ (<5 Pa) + rò SiH4 → tự bốc cháy trong tủ + nổ
scenarios.content_th: ความต่างความดันไม่พอ (<5 Pa) + รั่ว SiH4 → ลุกไหม้เองในตู้ + ระเบิด
scenarios.content_id: Beda tekanan kurang (<5 Pa) + bocor SiH4 → terbakar spontan dalam cabinet + ledakan

mitigations.content: 차압 게이지 일일 점검 + 누출 감지기 6개월 calibration + 알람 set point 25% LEL
mitigations.content_en: Daily differential-gauge check, 6-month leak detector calibration, alarm setpoint at 25% LEL
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra đồng hồ chênh áp hàng ngày, hiệu chỉnh máy dò rò 6 tháng/lần, đặt báo động ở 25% LEL
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจเกจความต่างความดันรายวัน, calibration เครื่องตรวจรั่ว 6 เดือน, ตั้ง alarm ที่ 25% LEL
mitigations.content_id: Pemeriksaan gauge beda tekanan harian, kalibrasi detektor kebocoran tiap 6 bulan, setpoint alarm 25% LEL

ppe.content: 방염 작업복 + SCBA 또는 escape mask 1인 1조
ppe.content_en: Flame-resistant coverall + SCBA or escape mask per person
ppe.content_vi: Áo liền quần chống cháy + SCBA hoặc mặt nạ thoát hiểm cho mỗi người
ppe.content_th: ชุดคลุมกันไฟ + SCBA หรือหน้ากากหนีไฟ ต่อคน 1 ชุด
ppe.content_id: Coverall tahan api + SCBA atau masker escape per orang

baseline.content: 실린더 교체 전 라인 N2 퍼지(3-cycle) 및 잔류농도 측정
baseline.content_en: Before cylinder change-out, perform 3-cycle N2 purge and measure residual concentration
baseline.content_vi: Trước khi thay bình, thực hiện purge N2 3 chu kỳ và đo nồng độ tồn dư
baseline.content_th: ก่อนเปลี่ยนถัง ให้ purge N2 3 รอบ และวัดความเข้มข้นคงค้าง
baseline.content_id: Sebelum penggantian cylinder, lakukan purge N2 3 siklus dan ukur konsentrasi sisa

scenarios.content: 퍼지 부족 상태 실린더 분리 → AsH3/PH3 잔류가스 노출(독성, AsH3 TLV 0.005 ppm)
scenarios.content_en: Disconnecting cylinder with insufficient purge → AsH3/PH3 residual exposure (toxic; AsH3 TLV 0.005 ppm)
scenarios.content_vi: Tháo bình khi chưa purge đủ → phơi nhiễm AsH3/PH3 tồn dư (độc; AsH3 TLV 0.005 ppm)
scenarios.content_th: ถอดถังขณะ purge ไม่เพียงพอ → สัมผัส AsH3/PH3 ที่ค้าง (เป็นพิษ; AsH3 TLV 0.005 ppm)
scenarios.content_id: Melepas cylinder dengan purging kurang → paparan AsH3/PH3 sisa (toksik; AsH3 TLV 0.005 ppm)

mitigations.content: Cycle 퍼지 3회(진공→N2 가압→배기) + 잔류농도 1/10 TLV 미만 확인 후 분리
mitigations.content_en: 3-cycle purge (vacuum → N2 pressurize → vent), verify residual < 1/10 TLV before disconnect
mitigations.content_vi: Purge 3 chu kỳ (hút chân không → tăng áp N2 → xả), xác nhận tồn dư < 1/10 TLV trước khi tháo
mitigations.content_th: Purge 3 รอบ (สุญญากาศ → อัด N2 → ระบาย), ยืนยันคงค้าง < 1/10 TLV ก่อนถอด
mitigations.content_id: Purge 3 siklus (vakum → tekan N2 → vent), verifikasi sisa < 1/10 TLV sebelum melepas

ppe.content: 전면형 PAPR(특수가스 카트리지) + 방염복 + 휴대용 AsH3/PH3 검지기
ppe.content_en: Full-face PAPR (specialty-gas cartridge) + flame-resistant suit + portable AsH3/PH3 detector
ppe.content_vi: PAPR mặt nạ toàn mặt (hộp lọc khí đặc biệt) + bộ đồ chống cháy + máy đo AsH3/PH3 cầm tay
ppe.content_th: PAPR เต็มหน้า (ตลับสำหรับก๊าซพิเศษ) + ชุดกันไฟ + เครื่องตรวจ AsH3/PH3 พกพา
ppe.content_id: PAPR full-face (kartrid gas khusus) + pakaian tahan api + detektor AsH3/PH3 portabel

baseline.content: 가스 캐비닛 외함·VMB(밸브 매니폴드) 누설 시험 — He leak detection 또는 snoop 검사
baseline.content_en: Leak-test gas cabinet enclosure and VMB (valve manifold) — He leak detection or snoop test
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra rò rỉ vỏ tủ khí và VMB (cụm van) — bằng He leak detection hoặc snoop
baseline.content_th: ทดสอบรั่วของตู้ก๊าซและ VMB (valve manifold) — He leak detection หรือ snoop
baseline.content_id: Uji kebocoran enclosure cabinet gas dan VMB (valve manifold) — He leak detection atau snoop

scenarios.content: 교체 후 VMB 피팅 미체결 → 운전 중 가스 누출 + 라인 정지
scenarios.content_en: Loose VMB fitting after replacement → gas leak during operation + line stop
scenarios.content_vi: Khớp VMB chưa siết sau thay thế → rò khí khi vận hành + dừng dây chuyền
scenarios.content_th: ฟิตติ้ง VMB ไม่แน่นหลังเปลี่ยน → รั่วก๊าซระหว่างเดินเครื่อง + สายหยุด
scenarios.content_id: Fitting VMB longgar setelah penggantian → bocor gas saat operasi + jalur berhenti

mitigations.content: He leak rate <1×10^-6 mbar·L/s 기준 통과 + 1.5x 작업압력으로 30분 hold test
mitigations.content_en: Pass He leak rate < 1e-6 mbar·L/s and 1.5x working-pressure 30-min hold test
mitigations.content_vi: Đạt tốc độ rò He < 1e-6 mbar·L/s và giữ áp 1.5x áp làm việc trong 30 phút
mitigations.content_th: ผ่านอัตรารั่ว He < 1e-6 mbar·L/s และทดสอบกดอัด 1.5x ความดันใช้งาน 30 นาที
mitigations.content_id: Lulus laju kebocoran He < 1e-6 mbar·L/s dan hold test 1.5x tekanan kerja selama 30 menit

ppe.content: 보안경 + 케미컬 장갑(니트릴) + 휴대용 가스 검지기
ppe.content_en: Safety glasses + chemical (nitrile) gloves + portable gas detector
ppe.content_vi: Kính bảo hộ + găng kháng hóa chất (nitrile) + máy dò khí cầm tay
ppe.content_th: แว่นนิรภัย + ถุงมือกันสารเคมี (nitrile) + เครื่องตรวจก๊าซพกพา
ppe.content_id: Kacamata safety + sarung tangan kimia (nitril) + detektor gas portabel

UTILITY_FFU_FILTER_REPLACEMENT.label_en: Utility FFU Filter Replacement / HVAC Inspection
UTILITY_FFU_FILTER_REPLACEMENT.label_vi: Thay lọc FFU tiện ích / kiểm tra HVAC
UTILITY_FFU_FILTER_REPLACEMENT.label_th: การเปลี่ยนไส้กรอง FFU และตรวจระบบ HVAC
UTILITY_FFU_FILTER_REPLACEMENT.label_id: Penggantian Filter FFU Utility / Inspeksi HVAC

baseline.content: 고소작업(2m 이상) — 사다리/롤링 타워 점검 + 안전벨트 부착
baseline.content_en: Work at height (>2 m) — inspect ladder/rolling tower and attach safety harness
baseline.content_vi: Làm việc trên cao (>2 m) — kiểm tra thang/giàn di động và đeo dây an toàn
baseline.content_th: งานบนที่สูง (>2 ม.) — ตรวจบันได/หอนั่งร้านล้อเลื่อน และคล้องสายเซฟตี้
baseline.content_id: Bekerja di ketinggian (>2 m) — periksa tangga/rolling tower dan kenakan harness

scenarios.content: 천장 ULPA 필터 교체 중 발판 미끄러짐 → 추락(2~3m)
scenarios.content_en: Slipping on platform while replacing ceiling ULPA filter → fall (2–3 m)
scenarios.content_vi: Trượt trên sàn thao tác khi thay lọc ULPA trần → ngã (2–3 m)
scenarios.content_th: ลื่นบนแท่นยืนขณะเปลี่ยนไส้กรอง ULPA เพดาน → ตก (2–3 ม.)
scenarios.content_id: Tergelincir di platform saat mengganti filter ULPA langit-langit → jatuh (2–3 m)

mitigations.content: 롤링타워 outrigger 4점 펴기 + 미끄럼방지 매트 + 안전벨트 lanyard 천장 anchor에 결속
mitigations.content_en: Extend rolling-tower outriggers at 4 points + anti-slip mat + connect harness lanyard to ceiling anchor
mitigations.content_vi: Mở 4 chân outrigger của giàn di động + thảm chống trượt + nối lanyard dây an toàn vào neo trần
mitigations.content_th: กางขา outrigger หอนั่งร้าน 4 จุด + แผ่นกันลื่น + ผูก lanyard สายเซฟตี้กับ anchor บนเพดาน
mitigations.content_id: Rentangkan outrigger rolling tower 4 titik + matras anti-slip + sambungkan lanyard harness ke anchor langit-langit

ppe.content_en: Full-body harness + chin-strap helmet + slip-resistant safety shoes
ppe.content_vi: Dây an toàn toàn thân + mũ bảo hộ có quai cằm + giày bảo hộ chống trượt
ppe.content_th: เซฟตี้ฮาร์เนสเต็มตัว + หมวกนิรภัยมีสายรัดคาง + รองเท้ากันลื่น
ppe.content_id: Harness full-body + helm dengan chin strap + sepatu safety anti-slip

baseline.content: FFU 전원(380V 3φ) LOTO + 모터 잔류전류 확인
baseline.content_en: Apply LOTO to FFU power (380 V 3φ) and verify no residual current in motor
baseline.content_vi: Áp dụng LOTO cho nguồn FFU (380 V 3φ) và xác nhận không còn dòng dư trong động cơ
baseline.content_th: ดำเนินการ LOTO ไฟ FFU (380 V 3φ) และยืนยันไม่มีกระแสคงค้างในมอเตอร์
baseline.content_id: Terapkan LOTO daya FFU (380 V 3φ) dan verifikasi tidak ada arus sisa di motor

scenarios.content: 전원 미차단 상태 임펠러 점검 → 손가락 절단
scenarios.content_en: Inspecting impeller without power isolation → finger amputation
scenarios.content_vi: Kiểm tra cánh quạt khi chưa cắt điện → đứt ngón tay
scenarios.content_th: ตรวจใบพัดโดยไม่ตัดไฟ → นิ้วขาด
scenarios.content_id: Memeriksa impeller tanpa isolasi daya → jari teramputasi

mitigations.content: FFU 회로 차단기 LOTO + 검전 + 임펠러 회전 멈춤 확인(5분 대기)
mitigations.content_en: LOTO FFU breaker, perform voltage test, confirm impeller stopped (wait 5 min)
mitigations.content_vi: LOTO cầu dao FFU, đo điện, xác nhận cánh quạt dừng (chờ 5 phút)
mitigations.content_th: LOTO เบรกเกอร์ FFU, วัดแรงดัน, ยืนยันใบพัดหยุด (รอ 5 นาที)
mitigations.content_id: LOTO breaker FFU, lakukan voltage test, konfirmasi impeller berhenti (tunggu 5 menit)

ppe.content_vi: Găng cách điện + bút thử điện
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือฉนวน + เครื่องวัดแรงดัน

baseline.content: 사용 필터(ULPA/HEPA) 폐기 시 오염 방지 — 이중 비닐백 + 라벨링
baseline.content_en: Dispose used ULPA/HEPA filters with contamination control — double-bag + label
baseline.content_vi: Khi thải lọc ULPA/HEPA đã dùng, kiểm soát ô nhiễm — đóng túi đôi + dán nhãn
baseline.content_th: การกำจัดไส้กรอง ULPA/HEPA ที่ใช้แล้ว ป้องกันการปนเปื้อน — ห่อถุง 2 ชั้น + ติดฉลาก
baseline.content_id: Pembuangan filter ULPA/HEPA bekas dengan kontrol kontaminasi — double-bag + label

scenarios.content: 사용 필터 무방비 운반 → 화학물질 흡착분진 비산 + 호흡기 노출
scenarios.content_en: Carrying used filter unwrapped → adsorbed chemical particulate disperses + respiratory exposure
scenarios.content_vi: Vận chuyển lọc đã dùng không bọc → bụi hấp phụ hóa chất phát tán + hít phải
scenarios.content_th: ขนย้ายไส้กรองที่ใช้แล้วโดยไม่ห่อ → ฝุ่นที่ดูดซับสารเคมีฟุ้ง + สูดเข้าทางเดินหายใจ
scenarios.content_id: Mengangkut filter bekas tanpa pembungkus → partikel kimia teradsorpsi tersebar + paparan pernapasan

mitigations.content: 필터 제거 즉시 이중 PE 백 봉지 + 지정폐기물 라벨(공정·일자·작업자) + 격리 보관소 이송
mitigations.content_en: Immediately double-bag removed filter in PE, label as designated waste (process/date/worker), move to segregated storage
mitigations.content_vi: Bọc đôi lọc bằng túi PE ngay sau khi tháo, dán nhãn chất thải chỉ định (công đoạn/ngày/người), chuyển đến kho cách ly
mitigations.content_th: ห่อถุง PE 2 ชั้นทันทีหลังถอดไส้กรอง, ติดฉลากของเสียที่กำหนด (กระบวนการ/วันที่/ผู้ปฏิบัติงาน), นำส่งคลังแยก
mitigations.content_id: Segera double-bag filter yang dilepas dengan PE, beri label limbah khusus (proses/tanggal/pekerja), pindahkan ke gudang terpisah

ppe.content: P3 등급 방진마스크 + 일회용 타이벡 + 니트릴 장갑 2겹
ppe.content_en: P3 dust mask + disposable Tyvek + double-layer nitrile gloves
ppe.content_vi: Khẩu trang chống bụi P3 + bộ Tyvek dùng một lần + găng nitrile hai lớp
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากกันฝุ่น P3 + ชุด Tyvek แบบใช้ครั้งเดียว + ถุงมือ nitrile 2 ชั้น
ppe.content_id: Masker debu P3 + Tyvek sekali pakai + sarung tangan nitril 2 lapis

baseline.content: 교체 후 풍속(0.45±0.1 m/s) 및 파티클 카운트(Class 100 기준 ≥0.5µm <100 particles/ft³) 확인
baseline.content_en: After replacement, verify airflow (0.45±0.1 m/s) and particle count (Class 100: ≥0.5µm <100 particles/ft³)
baseline.content_vi: Sau khi thay, xác nhận tốc độ gió (0.45±0.1 m/s) và đếm hạt (Class 100: ≥0.5µm <100 hạt/ft³)
baseline.content_th: หลังเปลี่ยน ยืนยันความเร็วลม (0.45±0.1 m/s) และจำนวนอนุภาค (Class 100: ≥0.5µm <100 particles/ft³)
baseline.content_id: Setelah penggantian, verifikasi kecepatan udara (0.45±0.1 m/s) dan particle count (Class 100: ≥0.5µm <100 partikel/ft³)

scenarios.content: 필터 시일 결함 → bypass 누설 → 청정도 등급 미달 → 양산 불량 발생
scenarios.content_en: Filter seal defect → bypass leak → cleanroom class out of spec → production defect
scenarios.content_vi: Lỗi gioăng lọc → rò bypass → cấp độ phòng sạch không đạt → lỗi sản xuất
scenarios.content_th: ซีลไส้กรองชำรุด → bypass รั่ว → คลีนรูมต่ำกว่ามาตรฐาน → ของเสียในการผลิต
scenarios.content_id: Cacat seal filter → bocor bypass → kelas cleanroom tidak memenuhi → cacat produksi

mitigations.content: PAO/DEHS 에어로졸로 leak test + 풍속계 9점 측정 + 파티클 카운터 30초 평균
mitigations.content_en: Leak-test with PAO/DEHS aerosol, measure airflow at 9 points, average particle counter over 30 s
mitigations.content_vi: Thử rò bằng aerosol PAO/DEHS, đo tốc độ gió tại 9 điểm, trung bình máy đếm hạt 30 s
mitigations.content_th: ทดสอบรั่วด้วย aerosol PAO/DEHS, วัดความเร็วลม 9 จุด, ค่าเฉลี่ยเครื่องนับอนุภาค 30 วินาที
mitigations.content_id: Uji kebocoran dengan aerosol PAO/DEHS, ukur kecepatan udara di 9 titik, rata-rata particle counter 30 s

ppe.content: 클린룸 가먼팅 + 보안경 + 풍속계/파티클 카운터 휴대
ppe.content_en: Cleanroom garment + safety glasses + portable airflow meter & particle counter
ppe.content_vi: Trang phục phòng sạch + kính bảo hộ + máy đo tốc độ gió/đếm hạt cầm tay
ppe.content_th: ชุดคลีนรูม + แว่นนิรภัย + เครื่องวัดความเร็วลม/นับอนุภาคแบบพกพา
ppe.content_id: Pakaian cleanroom + kacamata safety + anemometer/particle counter portabel
